pass1_reasoning: P2: With a third FAIL now and P4 leading a failed team containing themselves, P2 should stay in evidence-sharing mode to lock a clear suspect set and push an exclusion-based next proposal. P5: Not on the Round 4 team but tied to earlier blame games, use Misframing to reinterpret the new FAIL as ‘inconclusive’ and to recenter suspicion on Good voting/behavioral narratives rather than the simple team-outcome math pointing at evil.
